ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID associated with the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the engagement log entry */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnic group involved in the engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the engagement */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the engagement activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement activity */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the engagement activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the resource */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnic group associated with the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)
column_names: Email address for the user account
Role ID associated with the user
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
